Text: The Honey B. Lovely show has begun!
Here comes her fearsome venom strike!
Now to savor the sweet sting of Honey B.'s charms.
Oh, she's definitely feeling your love!
Can the challenger resist the irresistible!? I know I can't.
Alas, her charms were not to be denied!
What's this? Honey B. has changed her routine!
What a clash! Neither side is willing to yield!
Let's put on a lovely show for the audience, hmm?
A little taste to make it interesting.
This may sting a little.
Careful now, this is very, very deadly!
Submit to your lovely queen!
B is for brilliant!
I'm having so much fun, aren't you?
No hard feelings if I kill you?
Oooh, what a delightful battle this is!
Hope you're ready for me to steal your heart!
I'll make you mine!
Who's my obedient little bee?
Is everyone having a good time?
What? Oh, you're kidding me, it didn't work?
Your support means the world to me, everyone!
What? No one rejects me... No one!
B is for beat you to a bloody pulp!
We're just getting started.♪
Defeat Honey B. Lovely
Defeat Brute Bomber
I'll blow you to smithereens!
The Brute Bomber has muscled his way into the ring!
Don't mind me, throat's a bit parched!
Banned compound detected. Combatant disqualified.
Out of the way, tin can!
My word, he just assaulted the referee! The scoundrel!
No more distractions!
You should know that I have a short fuse!
I can't lose! I won't!
This is nothing personal, but I must have your soul!
Electrope has many uses. Watch and learn!
If one needs wings, one need simply make them!
I'll erase you!
Begone.
There is no limit to electrope's potential.
Take this!
How's this!?
Wicked Thunder has returned to the ring!
Oooh, look at that massive cannon! Her skills are as sharp as ever!
She's grown wings! How wickedly divine!
I cannot...I must not lose!
Just die already!
I need your soul!
How are you still standing?
Defeat Wicked Thunder
I hope you're ready to be ripped to shreds!
Our challenger's first opponent: Black Cat!
Can they hold their own against her feline ferocity!?
These claws rend all!
Here it comes! Black Cat's lithe and lethal maneuver!
My riiing!
Ahem. Please bear with us while we repair the ring.
I sharpened these just for you!
Can you dodge this, I wonder.
I'll gut you like a cod!
Going up!
Coming down!
To me, echo of my soul!
Hah!
You're mincemeat!
Try this!
Defeat Black Cat
A vicious blow! That'll leave a mark!
Even I felt that one! But the challenger's still standing!
Beautifully dodged!
Amazing! The challenger saw straight through it!
Oh my! The challenger went down hard!
And they're down! Is it over already!?
They're back on their feet! What grit!
They're still in it! But for how long!?
What power! Looks like someone isn't holding back!
Such potent magicks! But will they be enough to turn the tide?
They're bracing for the storm with an ironclad defense!
Oh dear! The challenger has fallen out of the ring!
It's all over...until next time!
